notes: Pulled the file. Two leads worth running down before the weekend.
Cuff is annealed and ready for the stone. Will set it after the shift.
Kai's meet is Saturday at Mesa Vista. Blocking the morning.
Calling Dorothy Sunday at the usual time. Ben is checking on her midweek.
Buckle is done. Photographing it for the Etsy listing tonight.
Eddie ran ahead on the interview. Walked him back through it after.
Carb is soaking. Tacoma stays the daily until the '78 is sorted.
Angela wants three more cuffs by month end. Doable if the silver ships.
Logged the evidence and signed the chain. Closed the locker.
Got the ridge done before it got hot. Copper kept up the whole way.
Pulled the file. Two leads worth running down before the weekend.
Cuff is annealed and ready for the stone. Will set it after the shift.
Kai's meet is Saturday at Mesa Vista. Blocking the morning.
Calling Dorothy Sunday at the usual time. Ben is checking on her midweek.
Black coffee first, then water. Long shift on the property case.
Bench day. Cut a turquoise cab and roughed the bezel.
Ran the Red Rock loop early. Kai set the pace.
Court prep most of the day. Stayed hydrated between sessions.
Soldered three bezels clean. Good flux, no firescale.
Interviews back to back. Coffee won out over water again.
Hot one in the garage. Kept the jug full at the bench.
Sunday call with Dorothy. Quiet afternoon at the bench after.
Shipped the Sedona order. Packed the bolo ties tight.
Drug case surveillance. Long stretch in the truck.
Stamped a belt buckle blank. Steady hand, clean lines.
Missing persons follow-up out near the Zuni Mountains.
Polished the spiny oyster inlay. Looks right in the light.
Filed the report and closed two open items. Slow water day.
